---
title: "Talks"
---

## Statistical Aspect of SHAP: Functional ANOVA for Model Interpretation

**November 10, 2023** | University of Texas at Austin, Austin, Texas

Presented as part of the [Fall 2023 UT SDS Seminar Series](https://stat.utexas.edu/events/seminar-series/sds-seminar-series-drew-herren).

## Feature selection for learning causal effects: a finite-sample, stratification estimator perspective

**August 12, 2022** | Washington University in St. Louis, St. Louis, Missouri

Presented at the [2022 NBER-NSF Seminar on Bayesian Inference in Econometrics and Statistics (SBIES)](https://event.olin.wustl.edu/sbies).

[Slides (PDF)](files/SSBIES-presentation-2022H2.pdf)
